# BizColab

> BizColab is a curated four-week mastermind cohort of eight business operators. Each cohort meets weekly for one month and is built around four pillars: accountability, complementary skill sets, honest peer feedback, and a network that outlasts the program. Founded by Michael Abraham.

## Key facts
- Format: 8 members per cohort, 4 weeks, one weekly group call plus daily async check-ins.
- The arc: Week 1 Map (diagnose, set one high-leverage goal), Week 2 Match (build for a partner), Week 3 Move (execute, pressure-test), Week 4 Measure (review results, plan next 60 days).
- Four focuses: implementing AI, compounding processes and tasks, accountability partners and group, and building business sustainability and sellability.
- Cost: a deliberately nominal membership fee — charged for accountability, not revenue. Exact figure shared with applicants moved forward.
- Availability: now enrolling, applications reviewed on a rolling basis.
- Location: weekly calls are virtual; optional in-person meetups for Los Angeles members.
- Who it's for: founders and operators running a real, revenue-generating business who want a small vetted peer room to grow faster.
- Who it's not for: pre-revenue founders or those seeking a passive course.

## Links
- Home and application: https://bizcolab.com/
- Founder (Michael Abraham): https://www.linkedin.com/in/michaelabraham-realtor/
